properties.name: dismiss-aria-label
properties.description: `string` – Allows setting a custom aria-label for the dismiss button.

events.name: removing
events.description: Fires `removing` whenever the banner has started its removing animation.

events.name: removed
events.description: Fires `removed` when the removing animation is done.

slots.name: Action Items
slots.description: Add action items like buttons to the component.

slots.name: Icon
slots.description: Add an icon to the component.

methods.name: remove
methods.description: Removes the banner from the DOM. Fires the `removing` event and starts the remove animation. When the animation finishes, it emits the `removed` event and removes the banner from the DOM completely. If you have a variable that refers to the banner element make sure to clear it otherwise it might cause a memory leak.
